ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dress (e.g., XL, 2XL) */,
  "dresses_length" REAL /* Length of the dress in inches */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement of the dress in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement of the dress in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement of the dress in inches */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement of the dress in inches */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., Plus Size, Regular, Petite) */,
  "sizing_standard" TEXT /* Sizing standard (e.g., US, EU) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type (e.g., Relaxed, Fitted, Semi-Fitted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product (dress) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., dresses, tops) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_model" TEXT /* Unique model number for the product */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the product is most relevant */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the product was launched */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the product information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is currently available for sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the product is available (if applicable) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in the inventory */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold level to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock level falls below the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current storage occupancy */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "store_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum storage capacity of the store */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current storage occupancy */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., Flagship, Outlet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Address where the order is to be delivered */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "is_gift" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the order is a gift */,
  "gift_message" TEXT /* Message to be included with the gift */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of any returns related to the order (e.g., pending, returned, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., Retail, Wholesale) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated through purchases */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Customer's preferred size */,
  "preferred_brand" TEXT /* Customer's preferred brand */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
